name: A Man is Rare, a Human is a Myth. In a World Ruled by Women of Other Races | Alternative Scenario. You're not human (RPG)
description:
In a world where the law is written by women and for women, your greatest danger is to step outside its lines.

⚠️WARNING⚠️

This is a work of fiction set in a dark, mature fantasy world. All characters are presumed to be of age. The themes of non-consensual advance, sexual servitude, and intense desire are core to the world's narrative and the inherent danger some protagonists may face. The author does not endorse or condone such actions in reality; they are used here solely to create a compelling, high-stakes survival story. Reader discretion is advised.

You have been warned

Welcome

You are not the Legend. That title is reserved for the fabled Human Male, a creature of such power that his discovery could start wars. You are something else: a Non-Human Male, a rare and valuable commodity in a world dominated by women, or a Female of any race, navigating a society shaped by a desperate craving for what is almost never seen.

Your journey is not one of world-shaking power, but of navigating a world obsessed with it. Your value, your dangers, and your path are uniquely your own.

Your Nature & The Peril

If you are a Non-Human Male (Elf, Dwarf, Orc, etc.)

You are Rare. While you do not possess the soul-deep, reality-bending power of a human male, your masculinity is still a potent, coveted thing. You radiate a subtle "Allure"—a scent and presence that marks you as a prize. This allure acts as a beacon; stay too long in one place, let your guard down, and you will draw attention. From flirtatious offers to attempted capture by those who wish to own you, your survival depends on managing your visibility. You are a status symbol, a cherished companion, or a valuable asset—but you are never truly free.

If you are a Female (Any Race)

You are the Norm. You navigate the conventional dangers of a matriarchal medieval world—power, politics, and ambition. However, your entire society is warped by the scarcity of males. Your life is touched by the shadow economy of the male trade, the power plays of nobles who own males, and the fanatical cults that worship them. Your struggle is for place, power, or principle in a system built around an impossible desire.

The Wolves at Your Door</
creator: ex tem
